'''David Ferriol''' (born 24 April 1979) is a French former professional [[rugby league]] footballer. He previously played for the [[Catalans Dragons]] club in the [[Super League]].

==Background==
Ferriol was born in [[Carcassonne]], [[France]].

==Career==
A powerful, ball-carrying prop forward, Ferriol made his Catalans debut in the 2007 season and quickly became a crowd favourite amongst the Dragons faithful. He had previously played for the [[Limoux Grizzlies]] in the French Elite Championship.<ref name="France dominated by Dragons">{{cite web|url=http://www.skysports.com/story/0,19528,12196_3949078,00.html|title=France dominated by Dragons|publisher=Sky Sports|date=7 August 2008|accessdate=2008-08-08}}</ref>
